summary: Iteration 18: Verified ePaper language separation fix and scraper functionality. Bug fix confirmed - Telugu ePaper now shows ONLY Telugu content (no English cached title leakage). All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with Playwright - language toggle switches between Telugu and English modes correctly.

passed_tests: Telugu ePaper (lang=te) has ONLY Telugu titles
Telugu ePaper summaries contain Telugu text (100%)
English ePaper (lang=en) has NO Telugu titles
English ePaper summaries have NO Telugu text
ePaper returns articles with proper structure
Language-specific title cache prevents English→Telugu leak

language_separation_fix.issue_fixed: English cached titles (epaper_title) were leaking into Telugu ePaper
language_separation_fix.fix_applied: Cache keys are now language-specific: epaper_title_en and epaper_title_te
language_separation_fix.safety_check_added: Lines 259-264 in epaper.py ensure Telugu titles aren't overwritten

critical_code_review_comments: Language-specific cache keys (epaper_title_en/te) properly separate translated titles
Safety check at lines 259-264 ensures Telugu title is restored if English cached title leaks
_has_telugu() helper correctly detects Telugu Unicode range (0C00-0C7F)
All 5 scrapers (TOI, Siasat, Eenadu, Deccan Chronicle, Way2News) have articles in DB

test_credentials.guest: No login required - navigate directly to /epaper

seed_data_creation: Used existing data - 2026-03-08 morning edition (96 articles in Telugu, 96 in English)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Language separation bug FIXED. The fix changes cache keys from 'epaper_title' to 'epaper_title_{lang}' (epaper_title_en for English, epaper_title_te for Telugu). Safety check in epaper.py lines 259-264 ensures if English cached title somehow gets set for Telugu mode, it falls back to raw title_te. All scrapers working - 778 total articles across 5 sources. Test file: test_epaper_language_scrapers.py verifies language isolation.

mocked_apis_list: Admin OTP verification uses hardcoded OTP 123456 for phone 9876543210
